ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), OR( RecordType.Name = "Case External Italy v2", RecordType.Name = "Case External Brazil", RecordType.Name = "Case External Austria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Switzerland" ), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Closed") , ISPICKVAL(Type,"Complaint"), INCLUDES(Financial_impact__c,"Financial"), ISBLANK(Text(Commercial_Gesture_Amount__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the Financial Correction Approved Amount.
